_comment: R0 SEED directory of AUTHORITATIVE official warning issuers per ADR-2606091200. G8 STRUCTURAL: sonae is a PRE-disaster substrate that MUST NOT originate official seismic/tsunami/typhoon warnings — it RELAYS them (earlyWarningRelay is relay-only + authoritativeSource cited). This is the allowlist of OFFICIAL public authoritative sources whose warnings sonae may relay; every entry isAuthoritativeIssuer=true and verificationStatus=unverified-seed (G14). sonae issues no warning of its own and declares no emergency (G10; declaration is kazaori's Council path).

sources.title: Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (PHIVOLCS)
sources.organization: PHIVOLCS, Department of Science and Technology (DOST), Republic of the Philippines
sources.warningProducts: Earthquake Information / Tsunami Warning / Tsunami Advisory / Volcano Bulletins; issued the 08 June 2026 Mw 7.8 Offshore Sarangani earthquake primer + tsunami warning
sources.notes: Philippines' national seismological/volcanological + tsunami warning authority. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8): sonae MUST NOT originate this warning — it relays PHIVOLCS's official product with authoritativeSource cited; sonae declares no emergency (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA)
sources.organization: PAGASA, DOST, Republic of the Philippines
sources.hazards: typhoon/tropical cyclone, flood, heavy rainfall, storm surge
sources.warningProducts: Tropical Cyclone Bulletins, Rainfall/Thunderstorm Advisories, Storm Surge Warnings, flood outlooks
sources.notes: Philippines' national meteorological authority. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8): sonae relays, never originates; no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA) — EEW + Tsunami + Emergency Warnings
sources.organization: Japan Meteorological Agency (気象庁), MLIT
sources.hazards: earthquake (Earthquake Early Warning), tsunami (incl. Major Tsunami Warning), typhoon, heavy rain/flood, volcanic, storm surge
sources.warningProducts: Earthquake Early Warning, Tsunami Warning/Advisory, Emergency Warnings (特別警報); issued tsunami advisories for Okinawa following the 08 June 2026 Mindanao quake
sources.notes: Japan's national met/seismic authority + EEW issuer. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: Pacific Tsunami Warning Center (PTWC)
sources.organization: NOAA / NWS Pacific Tsunami Warning Center (Ewa Beach, Hawaii); IOC-UNESCO PTWS
sources.warningProducts: Pacific-wide and regional Tsunami Threat Messages / Bulletins for member states incl. the Philippines and Indonesia
sources.notes: Regional tsunami warning center for the Pacific (covers the 08 June 2026 Mindanao event basin). RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: NOAA National Weather Service (NWS) + National Tsunami Warning Center
sources.organization: National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration / National Weather Service, USA
sources.hazards: severe weather, hurricane, flood, tsunami (NTWC), winter storm, extreme heat
sources.warningProducts: Warnings/Watches/Advisories via the Common Alerting Protocol (CAP), Wireless Emergency Alerts
sources.notes: US national met service + tsunami warning issuer. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: USGS Earthquake Hazards Program
sources.organization: United States Geological Survey, Department of the Interior
sources.warningProducts: Real-time earthquake parameters, ShakeMap, PAGER fatality/loss estimates; authoritative magnitude/depth for the 08 June 2026 Mw 7.8 Mindanao event
sources.notes: Global authoritative seismic source (open feed). RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8): sonae relays magnitude/impact, originates no warning; no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: Badan Meteorologi, Klimatologi, dan Geofisika (BMKG)
sources.organization: BMKG — Indonesian Agency for Meteorology, Climatology and Geophysics
sources.warningProducts: Earthquake info + Indonesia Tsunami Early Warning System (InaTEWS); relevant to the North Sulawesi tsunami wave from the 08 June 2026 event
sources.notes: Indonesia's met/seismic + tsunami early-warning authority. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (GDACS)
sources.organization: UN OCHA + European Commission Joint Research Centre
sources.hazards: earthquake, tsunami, tropical cyclone, flood, volcano, drought
sources.warningProducts: Green/Orange/Red automated multi-hazard alert scores + impact estimates (open feed)
sources.notes: Inter-agency multi-hazard alert aggregator (open). RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: Copernicus Emergency Management Service (EMS)
sources.organization: European Commission — Copernicus EMS (incl. EFAS flood + EFFIS fire)
sources.warningProducts: European Flood Awareness System (EFAS), European Forest Fire Information System (EFFIS), rapid mapping (open data)
sources.notes: EU emergency-management mapping + flood/fire awareness (open). RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: India Meteorological Department (IMD)
sources.organization: India Meteorological Department, Ministry of Earth Sciences
sources.warningProducts: Cyclone warnings, nowcasts, colour-coded weather warnings; INCOIS handles tsunami
sources.notes: India's national met authority. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: GeoNet (GNS Science) + NEMA
sources.organization: GeoNet / GNS Science + National Emergency Management Agency, New Zealand
sources.warningProducts: Earthquake info + NEMA national tsunami advisories/warnings (open feed)
sources.notes: NZ seismic monitoring (GeoNet) + NEMA tsunami authority. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: Bureau of Meteorology (BOM) + Joint Australian Tsunami Warning Centre
sources.organization: Australian Bureau of Meteorology + Geoscience Australia (JATWC)
sources.hazards: tropical cyclone, flood, severe weather, tsunami (JATWC), bushfire weather
sources.warningProducts: Tropical cyclone advices, flood warnings, tsunami warnings (JATWC)
sources.notes: Australia's national met + tsunami warning authority. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: SHOA — Servicio Hidrográfico y Oceanográfico de la Armada (Tsunami)
sources.organization: SHOA / SENAPRED, Chile
sources.warningProducts: National tsunami warnings/alerts (SNAM)
sources.notes: Chile's national tsunami warning authority. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: SASMEX — Mexican Seismic Alert System
sources.organization: CIRES / SASMEX, Mexico
sources.warningProducts: Public earthquake early-warning broadcasts (SASMEX)
sources.notes: Mexico's public earthquake early-warning issuer. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: AFAD — Disaster and Emergency Management Presidency
sources.organization: AFAD, Republic of Türkiye
sources.warningProducts: Earthquake bulletins + national disaster coordination + public alerts
sources.notes: Türkiye's national disaster-management authority. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: INGV — Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia
sources.organization: INGV + Dipartimento della Protezione Civile, Italy
sources.warningProducts: Seismic parameters + tsunami alert messages (NEAMTWS), civil-protection alerts
sources.notes: Italy's seismic/volcanic authority + NEAM tsunami center. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: Central Weather Administration (CWA)
sources.organization: Central Weather Administration, Taiwan
sources.warningProducts: Earthquake reports + EEW, typhoon warnings, tsunami advisories
sources.notes: Taiwan's met/seismic authority + EEW issuer. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: IOC-UNESCO Tsunami Programme + International Tsunami Information Center
sources.organization: Intergovernmental Oceanographic Commission of UNESCO (ICG/PTWS, ICG/NEAMTWS, ICG/IOTWMS) + ITIC
sources.warningProducts: Coordination of regional tsunami warning systems + service-product standards (not a direct public alerter)
sources.notes: Intergovernmental tsunami-warning coordination body. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: National Observatory of Athens — Institute of Geodynamics
sources.organization: National Observatory of Athens (NOA), Greece
sources.warningProducts: Seismic parameters + regional tsunami messages
sources.notes: Greece's seismic authority + NEAM tsunami node. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.

sources.title: INCOIS — Indian Tsunami Early Warning Centre
sources.organization: Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services (INCOIS), Ministry of Earth Sciences
sources.hazards: tsunami, storm surge, high waves (Indian Ocean)
sources.warningProducts: Indian Ocean Tsunami Warning + advisories (IOTWMS Regional Tsunami Service Provider)
sources.notes: Indian Ocean regional tsunami service provider. RELAY-ONLY BOUNDARY (G8); no declaration (G10). UNVERIFIED SEED scaffold.
